place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Two-Bedroom Garden Loft with Plunge Pool - Bophut
blurb: Compact two-bedroom garden lofts within a contemporary hillside estate between Bophut and Maenam on Koh Samui. Two-storey homes of around 100–170 m² with a private plunge pool, walled garden and a residents’ clubhouse. Leasehold from ฿8,000,000 — price excludes the land lease.
detail:
A two-bedroom garden loft within a contemporary residential estate set among coconut palms on the hillside between Bophut and Maenam, on Koh Samui’s north coast. Conceived as a low-maintenance lock-up-and-leave home or an investment, the lofts share the estate’s architecture of clean dark-roofed volumes and lush landscaping, with a residents’ clubhouse at its centre.

Each loft is arranged over two floors of roughly 100 m² (up to about 170 m² in later phases), on a private plot of 116 to 225 m². The ground floor holds an open-plan living, dining and kitchen space that opens to a walled garden and a private plunge pool of around nine square metres; upstairs, two en-suite bedrooms each open to the greenery, one with a wooden terrace and outdoor bathtub.

The lofts are offered leasehold from ฿8,000,000; this price is for the loft only and does not include the land lease, which is quoted separately. A monthly common-area fee of ฿45 per m² and a one-time sinking fund of ฿100,000 apply. The first phase is selling now, with further phases to follow — availability and plot sizes are confirmed on the current price list.

features.l: Between Bophut & Maenam · near the beaches
